title: selaginella arbuscula var. menziesii
intro: Selaginella arbuscula var. menziesii is a type of resurrection fern, a small, evergreen plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, known for its unique ability to revive itself after drying out. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella arbuscula var. menziesii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and support the immune system. It can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including tea, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
